_comment: Runtime surfaces the B2B storefront fetches at runtime but the CDN index omits (ADR-008). The 'derived' block is MACHINE-OWNED: regenerated from the boilerplate code by scripts/derive-surfaces.mjs and kept honest by the LKG gate, which opens a PR on drift. Do not hand-edit 'derived' — it will be overwritten. The 'residual' block is HUMAN-OWNED: platform/content surfaces no static scan can derive; each carries a reason.

residual._reason: Helix platform conventions — served by the platform, referenced nowhere in storefront code, so no static scan can derive them. Stable; reviewed by hand. (/placeholders, the default sheet, is derived via bare fetchPlaceholders() and lives in placeholderSheets.) /customer/create-account is content-linked (reached by discovery), not a code literal, so it is not declared here.
